## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g. Arch Linux, Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 14)
- **Terminal emulator:** (e.g. Alacritty, Kitty, iTerm2)
- **Axiom version:** (run `axiom --version`)
- **Install method:** (binary / from source / docker)

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages or terminal output.

## Screenshot

If applicable, add a screenshot to help explain the problem.

## Additional Context

Anything else that might be relevant - file type being edited, file size, config options in `~/.axiomrc`, etc.
